name: Gallery Downloader
description: Self-hosted media downloader — Go/Gin backend, React frontend, PostgreSQL + Redis queue with gallery-dl engine. Supports multi-source search jobs, scheduled downloads, min-video filtering, and 429 rate-limit retry with exponential backoff.

name: Subscription Bot
description: Telegram bot with Mercado Pago PIX payment integration. Multi-plan subscription management, preview-to-VIP funnel, per-channel content delivery, auto-tagging, and scheduled distribution. Production with real payments.

name: News Collector
description: Automated RSS news aggregator — collects from 20+ sources (BBC, Guardian, Folha, Billboard, Pitchfork), AI-powered summarization, Edge-TTS neural voice synthesis, and Telegram delivery. Runs every 6h via Hermes cron.

name: Dublin Calling Radio
description: Self-hosted 24/7 internet radio station on AzuraCast. Auto-DJ with 500+ track library, live streaming via Icecast, public now-playing API, listener stats, and Last.fm metadata enrichment for artist bios and tags.

name: Homelab Infrastructure
description: 3-node Raspberry Pi cluster (2x Pi5 8GB + Pi4 4GB) with TrueNAS storage. 55+ Docker services including Prometheus, Grafana, CVE monitoring, Uptime Kuma, Nginx Proxy Manager, and automated backup pipeline to OneDrive.

name: Portfolio Website
description: Personal portfolio with live homelab monitoring (CPU/RAM/Temp per Pi), AzuraCast radio player with live polling, RSS news feed with source filters, scrolling ticker, weather widget via geolocation, and contact form — all vanilla HTML/CSS/JS, zero dependencies.
